mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cat_mesh_concept ( id, descriptor_id, concept_ui, concept_name, is_preferred, casn1_name, registry_numbers, scope_note, translators_english_scope_note, translators_scope_note, concept_status, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.descriptorId}, #{item.conceptUi}, #{item.conceptName}, #{item.isPreferred}, #{item.casn1Name}, #{item.registryNumbers, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{item.scopeNote}, #{item.translatorsEnglishScopeNote}, #{item.translatorsScopeNote}, #{item.conceptStatus}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
